name: Cheese Salad Dressings - Great Chefs
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Cheese, Roquefort OR 3 tablespoons Cheese, Bleu
recipeInstructions:
Dressing: =========
Warm the ingredients gently until softened. Mix the ingredients with a whisk.
Makes enough for two salads.
Source: Great Chefs of New Orleans, Tele-record Productions - 1983
www.greatchefs.com - 747 Magazine Street, New Orleans, LA 70130
Chef Michel Marcais, Begue's Restaurant, New Orleans
